revision.comment: Bot: create Islamic-calendar day stub
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: overwrite Islamic-day stub
revision.text:
{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Muharram 23''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 23rd day of the month [[Muharram]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 23 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Muharram]] [[ar:23 محرم]] [[bn:২৩ মুহররম]] [[ckb:٢٣ی موحەڕڕەم]] [[fa:۲۳ محرم]] [[id:23 Muharam]] [[pnb:23 محرم]] [[sd:23 محرم]] [[ur:23 محرم]]

{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Muharram 23''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 23rd day of the month [[Muharram]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 23 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Muharram]] [[ar:23 محرم]] [[bn:২৩ মুহররম]] [[ckb:٢٣ی موحەڕڕەم]] [[fa:۲۳ محرم]] [[id:23 Muharam]] [[pnb:23 محرم]] [[sd:23 محرم]] [[ur:23 محرم]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

{{Islamic Muharram}} {{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Muharram 23''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 23rd day of the month [[Muharram]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 23 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Muharram]] [[ar:23 محرم]] [[bn:২৩ মুহররম]] [[ckb:٢٣ی موحەڕڕەم]] [[fa:۲۳ محرم]] [[id:23 Muharam]] [[pnb:23 محرم]] [[sd:23 محرم]] [[ur:23 محرم]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 23 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Muharram]] [[ar:23 محرم]] [[bn:২৩ মুহররম]] [[ckb:٢٣ی موحەڕڕەم]] [[fa:۲۳ محرم]] [[id:23 Muharam]] [[pnb:23 محرم]] [[sd:23 محرم]] [[ur:23 محرم]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

revision.text:
{{Islamic Muharram}} {{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Muharram 23''' is a day of the [[:en:Islamic calendar|Islamic calendar]]. It is the 23rd day of the month [[Muharram]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 23 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Muharram]] [[ar:23 محرم]] [[bn:২৩ মুহররম]] [[ckb:٢٣ی موحەڕڕەم]] [[fa:۲۳ محرم]] [[id:23 Muharam]] [[pnb:23 محرم]] [[sd:23 محرم]] [[ur:23 محرم]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Expand Arabic}}↵{{Expand Bengali}}↵{{Expand Persian}}" to ""
adding the templates to the front above the calendar template
bumping these so I can see the more important ones that have not been recently edited
Bot: add wikidata link from Indonesian interwiki (Q4121454)
working on the date checking
Moving from [[Category:Qq]] to [[Category:qq 4]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] to [[Category:qqqqq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] to [[Category:qqqq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Unchecked Islamic Dates]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qqqq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: remove incorrect Shona (sn:) interwiki links
Removing from [[Category:Qq 4]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: add interwikis from Wikidata

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ar:23 محرم]][[bn:২৩ মুহররম]][[ckb:٢٣ی موحەڕڕەم]][[fa:۲۳ محرم]][[id:23 Muharam]][[ms:23 Muharam]][[pnb:23 محرم]][[sd:23 محرم]][[ur:23 محرم]] {{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} {{Islamic Muharram}}
'''Muharram 23''' is a day of the [[:en:Islamic calendar|Islamic calendar]]. It is the 23rd day of the month [[Muharram]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 23 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Muharram]] [[ar:23 محرم]] [[bn:২৩ মুহররম]] [[ckb:٢٣ی موحەڕڕەم]] [[fa:۲۳ محرم]] [[id:23 Muharam]] [[pnb:23 محرم]] [[sd:23 محرم]] [[ur:23 محرم]] {{Islamic Calendar}} [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]]{{wikidata link|Q4121454}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "WD=" to "qid="
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ar:23 محرم]][[bn:২৩ মুহররম]][[ckb:٢٣ی موحەڕڕەم]][[fa:۲۳ محرم]][[id:23 Muharam]][[ms:23 Muharam]][[pnb:23 محرم]][[sd:23 محرم]][[ur:23 محرم]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ar:23 محرم]][[bn:২৩ মুহররম]][[ckb:٢٣ی موحەڕڕەم]][[fa:۲۳ محرم]][[id:23 Muharam]][[ms:23 Muharam]][[pnb:23 محرم]][[sd:23 محرم]][[ur:23 محرم]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ar:23 محرم]][[bn:২৩ মুহররম]][[ckb:٢٣ی موحەڕڕەم]][[fa:۲۳ محرم]][[id:23 Muharam]][[ms:23 Muharam]][[pnb:23 محرم]][[sd:23 محرم]][[ur:23 محرم]] {{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} {{Islamic Muharram}}
'''Muharram 23''' is a day of the {{ill|Islamic calendar|en|Islamic calendar|qid=Q28892|lt=Islamic calendar|1=Islamic calendar}}. It is the 23rd day of the month [[Muharram]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[ar:23 محرم]] [[bn:২৩ মুহররম]] [[ckb:٢٣ی موحەڕڕەم]] [[fa:۲۳ محرم]] [[id:23 Muharam]] [[pnb:23 محرم]] [[sd:23 محرم]] [[ur:23 محرم]] {{Islamic Calendar}}
{{wikidata link|Q4121454}} [[Category:Days 23 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Muharram]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments; consolidate 35 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25145964202|time triggered pipeline]]
